mano_cua.result_summary: 在Slate Angular RichText编辑器中创建两个段落后，通过剪切粘贴（Cmd+X/Cmd+V）成功移动节点顺序，段落从1-2变为2-1，DOM正确更新，未出现节点消失或渲染不一致
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The node move was successful! The paragraphs have been swapped. 1. 'This is the second new paragraph...' now appears FIRST (was originally second). 2. 'This is the first new paragraph...' now appears SECOND (was originally first). Successfully moved the second paragraph node above the first paragraph node using cut (Cmd+X) and paste (Cmd+V) technique within the editor.
